info.DAtuviSezaH: ayaM DAtuH 'stutiH' asmin arTe yadA prayujyate tadA gupUDUpavicCipaRipaniBya AyaH 3.1.28 ityanena asmAt svArTe 'Aya' iti sanAdyantapratyayaH viDIyate  Aya-pratyaye kfte agre SezAtkartari parasmEpadam 1.3.78 ityanena kevalaM parasmEpadasyEva pratyayAH viDIyante  api ca ayam Aya-pratyayaH ArDaDAtukapratyayasya vivakzAyAm AyAdaya ArDaDAtuke vA 3.1.31 ityanena vikalpyate ataH pakze Aya-pratyayaM vinA DAtoH anudAttasvaram anusftya AtmanepadasyEva rUpARi Bavanti  'vyavahAre' asmin arTe tu Aya-pratyayaH nEva viDIyate ataH kevalam Atmanepadasya rUpARi Bavanti
info.english_meaning: to deal to transact to do business to barter to praise
info.hindI_arTa: udyoga karanA vyavahAra karanA praSaMsA karanA stuti karanA
